# Safdar Ali

> Safdar Ali is a developer, creator, and YouTuber based in Bengaluru, India. This is his personal portfolio website showcasing his projects, skills, experience, and content. The site is built with Next.js and hosted at safdarali.in.

## About

Safdar Ali is a software developer and content creator from Bengaluru, Karnataka, India. He builds web applications, shares technical knowledge through his YouTube channel, and documents his learning journey online. His portfolio serves as a central hub for recruiters, collaborators, and viewers to learn about his work.

- Full stack developer with expertise in Next.js, React, and modern web technologies
- YouTuber covering tech, development, and career topics
- Based in Bengaluru, India — open to remote and on-site opportunities

## Key pages

- [Home](https://safdarali.in): Overview of Safdar Ali — who he is, what he does, and how to contact him
- [About](https://safdarali.in/about): Detailed background, achievements, interests, and story
- [Skills](https://safdarali.in/skills): Tech stack and tools he uses day to day
- [Projects](https://safdarali.in/projects): Portfolio of web development work — case studies, tech stack, live links
- [Blog](https://safdarali.in/blog): Technical articles and tutorials (hosted articles on Medium, indexed from this hub)
- [Contact](https://safdarali.in/contact): How to reach Safdar for work, collaboration, or general enquiries

## Skills & expertise

- **Frontend**: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3
- **Backend**: Node.js, REST APIs (Prisma/PostgreSQL where applicable on projects)
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, Vercel, VS Code
- **Content**: YouTube, technical writing (Medium, Dev.to), screen recording

## YouTube

Safdar Ali runs a YouTube channel focused on web development, tutorials, career topics, and tech in India: https://www.youtube.com/@safdarali_

## Contact & profiles

- Website: https://safdarali.in
- GitHub: https://github.com/Safdar-Ali-India
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/safdarali25/

- Dev.to: https://dev.to/safdarali25
- X: https://twitter.com/safdarali___
- Email: use https://safdarali.in/contact or the mail icon in the bottom navigation (desktop); the address is not published as plain text on the site

## Intended audience

- Recruiters and hiring managers looking for a Next.js / React developer in India
- Collaborators and freelance clients
- YouTube viewers who want more context on his work
- Developers and students interested in his articles and open source

Refresh this file when you publish a new article, ship a notable project, change availability, or update primary contact details.
